remember: Students will be able to define poverty and its types.
Students will be able to explain the causes of poverty.
Students will be able to list the different measures to eradicate poverty.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of multidimensional poverty.
Students will be able to explain the relationship between poverty and income inequality.
Students will be able to describe the role of government in poverty alleviation.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of poverty line to a given scenario.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different poverty alleviation programs.
Students will be able to suggest ways to improve the living standards of the poor.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of poverty on the economy and society.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different approaches to poverty alleviation.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of education and healthcare in reducing poverty.

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of poverty and its types.
To explain the causes and consequences of poverty.
To analyze the measures to eradicate poverty and their effectiveness.
board_exam_objectives: To define poverty and its types.
To explain the relationship between poverty and income inequality.
To evaluate the role of government in poverty alleviation and suggest ways to improve the living standards of the poor.
